baseline.note: Rolling median of our recent posts' PUBLIC metrics; updated by performance-tracker. null until first /track-performance.

ideas.title: AI just got a job: the three assistants that now do the work for you
ideas.trend_label: Agentic AI moves into real day-to-day work (ChatGPT Work, Claude Cowork, Meta Muse Spark)
ideas.fit_basis: Dead-center agentic-AI lane, aimed straight at entrepreneurs. momentum 0.95 (both newsletters), brand_fit 0.95, relevance 0.5 (no scored history). No penalties.
